name: Puffs Shower Curtain Green - Room Essentials™
description:
Add a contemporary aesthetic to your bath space with this Puffs Shower Curtain from Room Essentials™. Made of a year-round fabric, the green shower curtain showcases an oversized illustration of a woman with double buns and aqua-color shades to beautifully enclose a bathtub or shower stall for added privacy with a playful vibe. The decorative shower curtain features a buttonhole top for easy installation, and is machine washable for a quick refresh whenever needed.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
